name: Gourmet Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter in a large bowl.
2. Beat in the dark brown sugar and light brown sugar, a little at a time, until light.
3. Stir in the vanilla extract.
4. Beat in the eggs, one at a time.
5. Stir in the salt and flour mixture into the batter.
6. Add the walnuts and chocolate chips.
7. Chill the batter for an hour.
8. Drop rounded 1/4 cup portions of dough onto buttered baking sheets, spacing them about 3 inches apart.
9. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) for 12 to 15 minutes.
10. Cool on wire racks.
